Container.Name: commonplace
Container.Overview:
Commonplace is a self-hosted Readwise alternative — capture, browse, review, and resurface your book and article highlights.
Features: • Import from KOReader, Kindle, Obsidian, Readwise API, or manual entry • Full-text search with filter by source, tags, favorites, and book • Book view with cover art via Hardcover.app and Open Library • Daily review with SM-2 spaced repetition (rate Forgot/Hard/Good/Easy) • Achievement system with streak tracking • Tag management with colors and merge • Backup & restore database and covers as ZIP • KOReader plugin and Obsidian plugin for sync • Responsive mobile UI with PWA support
First run: Open the web UI and the setup wizard will guide you through creating your admin account. No environment variables required to get started.
Container.Changes: v0.8.4 — Email digest, review heatmap, mobile UI, inline highlight context

Config.Name: Data path
Config.Description: Persistent storage for SQLite database, covers, backups, and settings. Maps to /app/data in the container.

Config.Name: SESSION_SECRET
Config.Description: Secret key for signing session cookies and CSRF tokens. If left empty, a random one is generated and persisted in data/.session_secret on first start. Set explicitly for production to avoid invalidating sessions on restart.

Config.Name: TZ
Config.Description: Timezone for the container (used by the email digest scheduler and review timestamps).

Config.Name: COMMONPLACE_USERNAME
Config.Description: Optional — admin username for auto-creating the initial account on first start. If not set, the setup wizard prompts for credentials in the browser on first launch.

Config.Name: COMMONPLACE_PASSWORD
Config.Description: Optional — admin password. Must be set together with COMMONPLACE_USERNAME if that is set. Ignored if USERNAME is empty.

Config.Name: SESSION_HTTPS_ONLY
Config.Description: Set to 'true' if you access Commonplace over HTTPS with a valid certificate. Ensures the session cookie is only sent over encrypted connections. Keep 'false' for LAN-only HTTP access.

Config.Name: HARDCOVER_API_KEY
Config.Description: Optional — API key for Hardcover.app for better book cover art. Can also be set later from the Settings page in the web UI. When empty, falls back to Open Library covers (no key needed).
